description: Apache Commons Exec provides Java APIs for reliably launching and controlling external operating-system processes from JVM applications. It handles command-line construction, stream pumping, watchdog timeouts, exit-value handling, and asynchronous execution helpers.

Apache Commons Exec provides Java APIs for reliably launching and controlling external operating-system processes from JVM applications. It handles command-line construction, stream pumping, watchdog timeouts, exit-value handling, and asynchronous execution helpers.
